seoTitle: Narra Tarra vs Narraloggan — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Narra Tarra and Narraloggan. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Narra Tarra vs Narraloggan: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Narra Tarra and Narraloggan.
heading: Narra Tarra vs Narraloggan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Narra Tarra, Western Australia and Narraloggan, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Narra Tarra has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Narraloggan (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Narra Tarra or Narraloggan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Narra Tarra has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Narraloggan scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Narra Tarra scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Narraloggan scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Narra Tarra or Narraloggan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Narra Tarra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
